subcodes.first_line: O cherished friend! Thy book hath reached Us and verily imparted utmost joy, and likewise profound sorrow, inasmuch as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست مکرم کتاب شما رسید فی الحقیقه سرور کلی بخشید و همچنین حزن بسیار چه که
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
